overview: Bricherds.ai is an all-in-one AI platform combining the best of ChatGPT, Claude, Grok, DeepSeek, and Perplexity. Chat with multiple AI models, generate and analyze images, summarize documents, and create code — all in one place with free access and persistent chat history.
features: Multi-model AI chat (GPT-4o, Claude, DeepSeek, Grok)
Document and photo analysis with AI
Login and signup with persistent chat history
Light theme with organized feature dashboard
Free API access — no key required
